sources.title: Difference in pronunciation between: a, á, ã, â and à
sources.body: Sep 11, 2014 · Could I get a few people to explain the difference in pronunciation between a, á, ã, â and à in Portuguese using English comparisons (if possible)? I can't seem to find a thread or other Web …

sources.body: Mar 19, 2010 · So what's the problem, It's a ’ (RIGHT SINGLE QUOTATION MARK - U+2019) character which is being decoded as CP-1252 instead of UTF-8. If you check the Encodings table of this …

sources.title: HTML encoding issues - "Â" character showing up instead of
sources.body: Somewhere in that mess, the non-breaking spaces from the HTML template (the s) are encoding as ISO-8859-1 so that they show up incorrectly as an "Â" character That'd be encoding to UTF-8 then, …

sources.title: What is the difference between a += b and a =+ b , also a++ and ++a?
sources.body: Feb 23, 2011 · a += b is equivalent to a = a + b a = +b is equivalent to a = b a++ and ++a both increment a by 1. The difference is that a++ returns the value of a before the increment whereas ++a returns …

notes: 今日市场震荡，科技板块活跃，成交额放大。
summary:
新闻摘要：

主题：A股市场

今日A股市场呈现震荡格局，成交量有所增加，其中科技板块表现较为活跃。然而，上述检索结果与附加素材主要涉及语言编码和字符显示问题，与A股市场的实际情况无直接关联。对于投资者而言，关注市场动态、政策变化和技术板块的表现更为重要。

请注意，提供的链接内容与主题无关，可能需要进一步筛选相关的信息以提供更准确的新闻摘要。
